summary: Mobile view audit completed for The Doggy Company Pet Life Operating System. Fixed critical mobile menu cut-off issue by making logo compact on mobile and adding overflow-x-hidden to nav container. All mobile features now working correctly.

issues: Minor horizontal overflow (465px > 393px viewport) - cosmetic only, form is usable

mobile_homepage_renders.details: Homepage renders correctly at 393x852 viewport. Hero section, CTA buttons, stats visible.

mobile_navigation_hamburger_menu.details: Fixed: Menu items were cut off (x=-56). After fix, menu items visible at x=16. All 14 pillar items visible with icons. Join now, Sign in, Ask Mira AI buttons accessible.

mobile_shop_page.details: Products visible in grid. Mira panel minimized (just 'Mira' button). Category filters, search, trust badges all visible.

mobile_login_page.details: Form is usable. Email input, password input, Sign In button all visible and functional. Login flow works.

mobile_dashboard.details: After login, dashboard shows pet info (Mojo), Pet Soul score (100%), stats, and action buttons.

mobile_product_detail_add_to_cart.details: Clicking product opens cart sidebar. Product image, name, price, quantity controls visible. Proceed to Checkout button works.

mobile_cart_sidebar.details: Cart sidebar opens and closes correctly. Shows product details, subtotal, shipping, total. Continue Shopping and Proceed to Checkout buttons visible.

mobile_pillar_pages_mira_not_blocking.details: Celebrate, Dine, Travel pages all show Mira panel minimized. Content not blocked. Hero sections, products, filters all visible.

mobile_checkout_flow.details: Checkout page shows form fields (Name, Email, Phone, Address). Payment button is 361x48px (good tappable size).

fixes_applied.change: Made logo compact on mobile (show only icon, hide text) to prevent horizontal overflow
Added overflow-x-hidden to nav element to prevent horizontal scroll
Added overflow-x-hidden to nav container div
Added w-full and max-h-[calc(100vh-8rem)] overflow-y-auto to mobile menu for proper scrolling

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile view audit completed. Key fix: Logo was causing horizontal overflow on mobile (465px content on 393px viewport), which shifted the entire nav container left by 72px, cutting off mobile menu items. Fixed by showing compact logo (icon only) on mobile screens. MiraContextPanel already starts minimized on mobile (position='bottom' triggers isMinimized=true). All pillar pages, shop, login, dashboard, cart, and checkout work correctly on mobile.
